titleStmt.title: SII 25.133: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 133. (A.R. No. 133 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the second prākāra of the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara who took the title ‘emmaṇḍalamum-koṇḍaruḷiya’ Year 36: 1304 A.D.

summary.p: The record is dated in the year 36, Vaikāśi 1, which details though do not admit verification, seem to correspond to 1304 A.D., April 25. On palaeographical grounds, the inscription may be assigned to c. 14th century.

It records a deed executed by the śrīkāryam of the deity Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār, the māḍāpattiyam Avimuttīchchuram-uḍaiyāṉ, the śivabrāhmaṇas who had the right of worship for a cycle of 30 days and the tāṉattār of the tāṉam (sthāna) to Akkanambi Aṭkoṇḍapiḷḷai alias Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr-nambi of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that earlier in the 34th regnal year of the king, some of the authorities (probably of the temple), had taken the jewels and the kāṇi lands, ēmbal and kuṟichchi that was enjoyed by the Perumbaṟṟap-puliyūr-nambi illegally by putting this person and the sabhaiyār inside the temple and cancelled as a sort of a bond by mutilation (kāda(ra)ṟichcheydu) in order to convert the lands as a mānya and thus the said jewels and lands were given to a Vaḷḷuvanāḍāḻvāṉ. Then the dispute was taken up by Uḍaiyār Muṉaiyadarayar who got the nambi and the sabhaiyār released, brought them before Perumāḷ with a request to settle the issue. On enquiry, it was found that the above nambi had not committed any crime and therefore (he) ordered for the land compensation (pratikshētram) to be paid to Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr-nambi. The lands given to him consist of 20 mā of lands inclusive of ēmbal and kuṟichchi and the lands belong to the temple of Kayilāśāmuḍaiya-nayiṉār. A number of persons including the śrīkāryam Perumāḷpādar ••• ••• •••• māḍāpattiyam Avimuttīśvaram-uḍaiyāṉ, the inviduals for their respective shares and those of the tāṉattār figure as signatories to the above document.
This Vaḷḷuvanāḍāḻvāṉ may be identified with his namesake who figures in a record of Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundara-pāṇḍya. (cf: A.R.Ep., 1909, No. 315). This king seems to be a third king of that name.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrī meṟkittikkumel komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 vatu vaikāci mātam 1 tiyati keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputattūr Akkanampi Āṭkoṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṉa perumpaṟṟap puliyūr nampikku makkaḷukkum Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār koyil Āti caṇṭeśvara devar
śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum māṭāpattiyam Apimutticcura muṭaiyāṉu muppatu vaṭṭattu civappirāmaṇarum tāṉattukku Amaiñca tāṉattārum piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu muṉṉāḷ 3 10 4 vatu vaḷḷuva nāṭāḻvāṉ Āḷar kaikoṇṭu vantu Iruntu niṟceyippu Oḻiya cilaka(ā)ṟ ceytu taraveṇumeṉṉa grāma
ma māṉṉiyamāka Itu Ivaṉai paṭātey perumpaṟṟip puliyūr nampiyum carumpuṟam paiy poyniṟka Akappaṭṭa sabhaiyāraiyum Eṅkaḷaiyum koyilile Aṭaittuvaittu Aṉyāyattāle Iperumpaṟṟappuliyūr nampi kāṇiyaiyum Empalaiyum malaiyum kuṟicciyaiyum Ivaṉuva nāṭāḻvā tukku
kalveṭṭivittu tutiruvāparaṇattai Eṭuttu koḷkaiyāl Inilaṅkaḷ Iṉṟaṟutiyāka tāmu nāṅkaḷum vaḻakkāy kiṭakkaiyil Innāḷile vida vaḷale Uṭaiyār muṉaiyatarayar sabhaiyāraiyum Eṅkaḷaiyum Eṅkakaḷaiyum Eṟṟi perumāḷ tirumuṉpe vīṇṇappa
ñ ceyta Aḷavile Ipperumpaṟṟappuliyūr nampi kuṟṟañceyyātapaṭiyāle Ivaṉ kāṇi peṟa kaṭavāṉeṉṟum pratikṣetṟamāka ṉāyaṉāṟku brāmmaṇarku muṉ viṭakaṭavarkaḷ Eṉṟum tiruviḷḷamāṉapaṭiyāle Iperumpaṟṟapuliyūr nampi nilamāy kalveṭṭi nilam Empalkuṟicciyuḷpaṭa nilam Irupatu mā
vum Uṭaiyār śrī kayilācamuṭaiya nayiṉārkku rūpāy Orumā�m kuṟiccikaḷum Ipperumpaṟṟappuliyūr nampikkuviṭṭu Itukku pratikṣetramāka sabhaiyār viṭṭa rūpāy 1mā nmam kalveṭṭikkoṇṭu tammuṭaiya nilam paṇṭāṭu paḻanāṭutaramaṉupavikka viṭṭu Ippaṭi sammaticcu piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutto
m Akkanampi Āḷ koṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṉa perumpaṟṟap puliyūr nampikku Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar śrīkāriyañceyvārkaḷum māṭāpattiyam Avimuttiūśvara muṭaiyāṉum muppatu vaṭṭattu śivabrahmaṇarum tāṉattukku Amaiñca tāṉatārum Āka
Ivvaṉaivomum . śrīkāriyam māṭāpattiyam Avimuttiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu mutal paṅkukku Amainta cun=tasuntara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
